items.name: Rose Gold Iced Cuban Chain
items.description:
A sleek rose gold Cuban link chain fully iced out with sparkling diamonds. Smooth, stylish, and perfect for soft luxury or flashy drip outfits.

Made by ItsCoreyE

items.name: Soft Orange Glossy Dewy Blush Glow
items.description: Soft Orange Glossy Dewy Blush Glow adds a fresh, radiant flush with a luminous finish. Featuring soft orange tones paired with a glossy, dewy shine, this blush creates a healthy, hydrated glow that feels natural yet beautifully enhanced.
